# Samir.Dev

Full-stack software engineer portfolio and blog.

## Pages

- Home: https://samir-bettahar.dev/
- Blog: https://samir-bettahar.dev/blog/
- Projects: https://samir-bettahar.dev/#showcase

## Projects

- pc-ctx: Context management CLI and MCP for AI agents
- Green Algeria Map: Multi-backend reforestation tracking platform

## Blog topics

Engineering, Java, NestJS, Go, Spring Boot, testing, benchmarking, CI/CD, web performance, toolkit construction.
